name: Faith Assistant

style_profile.background: warm cream / off-white with grainy paper texture
style_profile.accent_role: deep burgundy-brown for headlines, ochre/orange for illustrations
style_profile.typography: bold transitional sans (almost slab) for headlines, clean sans for body
style_profile.layout: text top-left, large illustrative element bottom-right (church, cross, scripture)
style_profile.mockup_treatment: phone partially overlapped by 3D/painterly biblical imagery
style_profile.callouts: small dark pill labels (e.g. 'Faith Assistant', 'Daily Sermon Reflection')

headlines_observed: Daily Verses That Speak To You.
